## Verification Checklist

**Grant being reviewed:** #[link to submission issue]

### Source Verification
- [ ] Official website URL is accessible and belongs to the funder (not a third-party aggregator)
- [ ] Grant/program is confirmed active (not expired, not "coming soon" without a date)
- [ ] Funding amounts match what's stated on the official source
- [ ] Eligibility criteria are accurately described

### Data Accuracy
- [ ] Funder name and category are correct
- [ ] Stage classification is accurate
- [ ] Sector tags are appropriate
- [ ] Equity/non-dilutive status is verified
- [ ] Deadline or application mode is current

### Cross-check
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing grant in the database
- [ ] Information cross-checked against at least one additional source (press release, govt portal, news article)

### Reviewer Notes
<!-- Add any observations, corrections, or additional context here -->

**Verdict:** 
- [ ] **Approved** — ready to be added
- [ ] **Needs changes** — submitter needs to update (comment with specifics)
- [ ] **Rejected** — reason noted below
